documents.title: Phase 11 Storage Layer: SQLite
documents.content: In the Phase 11 demo pack, one of Quester.AI's two default persistence layers is SQLite, which stores task runs, settings profiles, and knowledge metadata.

documents.title: Phase 11 Storage Layer: JSONL
documents.content: In the Phase 11 demo pack, the other default persistence layer is JSONL, which mirrors append-only runtime events, traces, and status history.

documents.title: Project Aurora Demo Note A
documents.content: Project Aurora launch month is March according to Phase 11 demo note A.

documents.title: Project Aurora Demo Note B
documents.content: Project Aurora launch month is April according to Phase 11 demo note B.
